description:
Role Overview
This role is mainly responsible for building and maintaining a data automation system to improve reporting efficiency and reduce manual work, with a focus on Python, SQL, and data processing.
Key Responsibilities
Develop and maintain a data automation system to extract data from platforms (via API or web automation)
Automate data downloading and store data in server, database, or cloud (e.g. Google Cloud)
Clean, process, and structure raw data for analysis
Manage and optimize database performance using Python/SQL
Integrate data with Power BI to build dashboards and reports
Ensure data accuracy, system stability, and security
Troubleshoot issues and continuously improve system performance
Requirements & Qualifications
Strong Python & SQL knowledge
Experience with API integration or web automation
Familiar with database systems (MySQL / PostgreSQL)
Able to work independently and deliver tasks
Basic understanding of data reporting tools (e.g. Power BI)
Experience in handling and processing structured/unstructured data
Good to Have
Experience in data engineering / data pipeline
Cloud experience (Google Cloud / AWS)
Experience handling large datasets
Why Join Us
Opportunity to build and own a data automation system from scratch
Direct impact on business decisions through data and reporting
Hands-on role with real-world data and system development
Flexible remote working arrangement (WFH), with minimal onsite requirements
Opportunity to grow into a senior data / system role as the system scales
Work closely with management and contribute to key business strategies
Medical and Transportation Claimable Benefit
